result.reason: To improve user experience by automatically focusing the remote session when the mouse hovers over the RDP area, eliminating the need for an explicit click.
result.approach: Modify `ConnectionWindow.WndProc` to identify the currently active `InterfaceControl` when a `WM_MOUSEACTIVATE` message is received. If the mouse is over an RDP `InterfaceControl`, programmatically set focus to that `InterfaceControl`. This will ensure the RDP session gains input focus when the mouse enters its area.
